use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node};

fn walk_tree(root: Node, source: &str) {
    let mut cursor = root.walk();
    for child in root.named_children(&mut cursor) {
        let start = child.start_byte();
        let end = child.end_byte();
        let text = &source[start..end];
        process_text(text);
        walk_tree(child, source);
    }
}

fn collect_at_points(root: Node, source: &str, points: &[(usize, usize)]) -> Vec<String> {
    points
        .iter()
        .filter_map(|&(row, col)| {
            let node = root.descendant_for_point_range(
                tree_sitter::Point { row, column: col },
                tree_sitter::Point { row, column: col + 1 },
            )?;
            let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()];
            Some(text.to_string())
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_text(_text: &str) {}
